steps.title: Identify Chaudhuri's field
steps.content: The notes say Anika Chaudhuri studies sedimentary rocks. They also state that a scientist who studies sedimentary rocks is called a sedimentologist. The student wants to identify what type of scientist Chaudhuri is.

steps.title: Reject less direct choices
steps.content: Choice A only identifies chalk as a sedimentary rock. Choice B says some scientists study examples of sedimentary rocks. Choice C says such scientists exist, but it does not identify Chaudhuri's type.

steps.title: Give the scientist type
steps.content: The remaining choice directly applies the definition to Chaudhuri and identifies her as a sedimentologist. The answer is D.
